ast.source: Anything to note about today's energy?
ast.target: 今天能量有什么要记录的吗？

ast.name: title
ast.source: Daily and monthly digests require EMRALD PRO
ast.target: 每日和每月摘要需要EMRALD PRO

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your EMRALD API key from effortmastery.com
ast.target: 来自 effortmastery.com 的您的 EMRALD API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Yellow bar + counter when exceeding daily hours
ast.target: 超出每日工作时长时显示黄色条和计数器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show burnout warning modals when d8 crosses threshold
ast.target: 当 d8 超过阈值时显示倦怠警告弹窗

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 轮播公告卡片的间隔秒数（5-60）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How the session timer is displayed
ast.target: 会话计时器的显示方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write EMRALD metadata to note frontmatter
ast.target: 将 EMRALD 元数据写入笔记前置信息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log API calls and state changes to console
ast.target: 将 API 调用和状态变更记录到控制台

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Day of the week your weekly digest is generated
ast.target: 生成每周摘要的星期几

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hour of day in UTC (e.g. 09:00 = 4am EST). Digests run on the hour.
ast.target: UTC 时间的小时数（例如 09:00 = 美东时间凌晨4点）。摘要在整点运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download all your EMRALD data as a JSON file. The file saves to your vault's root folder on disk — it won't appear in Obsidian's file explorer since .json files aren't indexed. Free tier: 90-day history + D1-D8 metrics. Pro: everything.
ast.target: 将您所有的 EMRALD 数据下载为 JSON 文件。文件会保存到您保险库根目录的磁盘上——由于 .json 文件未被索引，它不会出现在 Obsidian 的文件资源管理器中。免费版：90天历史记录 + D1-D8 指标。专业版：所有数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset and show the first-time setup wizard again
ast.target: 重置并重新显示首次设置向导

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Help us improve EMRALD — report bugs, request features, or share your experience
ast.target: 帮助我们改进 EMRALD — 报告错误、请求功能或分享您的体验

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search for a note to link...

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 高级模式已在本地启用 — 将在下次会话时同步。

ast.target: 概况已本地保存 — 稍后同步。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Recovery activity queued — will sync when online
ast.target: 恢复活动已排队 — 上线后将同步

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Energy check-in queued — will sync when online
ast.target: 能量签到已排队 — 上线后将同步

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Found a stale session but could not discard it — try refreshing.
ast.target: 发现一个过期会话但无法丢弃 — 请尝试刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active projects. Add one first.
ast.target: 没有活动项目。请先添加一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Runaway session discarded — no data recorded.
ast.target: 失控会话已丢弃 — 未记录数据。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session may have already ended — clearing local state.
ast.target: 会话可能已结束 — 正在清除本地状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session stopped locally \u2014 will sync when online.
ast.target: 会话已在本地停止 — 上线后将同步。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 您已有5个活动项目。请先完成或停用一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dropped orphaned offline session (no start action found)
ast.target: 已丢弃孤立的离线会话（未找到启动操作）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session created but could not extract id — dependent actions dropped
ast.target: 会话已创建但无法提取ID — 依赖操作已丢弃

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Network error during session reconciliation — will retry later
ast.target: 会话协调期间发生网络错误 — 稍后将重试

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This is your day. A 24-hour bar shows time passing. When you start a session, the clock freezes and a green bar fills — showing your daily effort in real time.
ast.target: 这是你的一天。一个24小时的条形图显示时间的流逝。当你开始一个会话时，时钟会暂停，一个绿色条形会填充——实时显示你每日的努力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Your active projects live here. Click one to start a session, open the project note, or change the location / effort level.
ast.target: 你活跃的项目都在这里。点击一个项目以开始会话、打开项目笔记，或更改位置/努力级别。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seven sections break down the ins and outs of your effort levels. Each one opens a detailed workspace view for you to analyze and track. If you're a PRO user, read effort insights and pinnable sparklines at a glance.
ast.target: 七个部分详细分解了你努力级别的方方面面。每个部分都会打开一个详细的工作区视图，供你分析和跟踪。如果你是PRO用户，可以一目了然地阅读努力洞察和可固定的迷你图。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: EMRALD watches your work patterns. If effort levels get risky, you'll get a gentle heads-up with suggested actions.
ast.target: EMRALD会观察你的工作模式。如果努力级别变得有风险，你会收到一个温和的提醒，并附带建议的操作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Light — 25% of your daily work time
ast.target: 轻度 — 占你每日工作时间的25%

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Moderate — 50% of your daily work time
ast.target: 中度 — 占你每日工作时间的50%

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum — 100% of your daily work time
ast.target: 最大 — 占你每日工作时间的100%

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 你的努力平衡是在改善还是在恶化？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How well E-levels predict actual effort
ast.target: E级别预测实际努力的准确度

ast.source: When you do your best work

ast.target: 已完成与已放弃的项目

ast.name: desc
ast.source: E-level variety in your daily sessions
ast.target: 你每日会话中的E级别多样性

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How enjoyable your flow sessions are
ast.target: 你的心流会话有多愉快

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 高努力 + 低投入模式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How starting energy affects your work
ast.target: 起始能量如何影响你的工作

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Overall quality score for your sessions
ast.target: 你会话的整体质量分数

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How much your behavior diverges from your profile
ast.target: 你的行为与个人资料的偏离程度

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How well your recharge routines restore energy
ast.target: 你的恢复常规恢复能量的效果

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How long you sustain physical effort
ast.target: 你维持身体努力的时长

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How long you sustain cognitive effort
ast.target: 你维持认知努力的时长

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 来自内在兴趣/热情的驱动力

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 来自外部奖励/截止日期的驱动力

ast.name: description
ast.source: AI-powered observations, suggestions, and discoveries about your effort patterns — all in one place.
ast.target: AI驱动的观察、建议和关于你努力模式的发现——尽在一处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Daily and monthly digests are available with EMRALD Pro.
ast.target: 每日和每月摘要可通过EMRALD Pro获取。

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Low-effort tasks you can sustain indefinitely — quick check-ins, light reading, routine maintenance. These barely dent your energy budget.
ast.target: 你可以无限期维持的低努力任务——快速签到、轻松阅读、例行维护。这些几乎不会消耗你的能量预算。

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Meaningful work that requires focus but not peak performance — writing, planning, steady progress on familiar projects.
ast.target: 需要专注但无需巅峰表现的有意义工作——写作、规划、在熟悉的项目上稳步进展。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Session expired — please re-enter your API key in Settings.
ast.target: 会话已过期 — 请在设置中重新输入您的API密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Rate limited — please wait a moment and try again.
ast.target: 请求频率受限 — 请稍候片刻后重试。

ast.name: error
ast.source: EMRALD is having trouble. Please try again in a moment.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid API key — please check your key in Settings.
ast.target: API密钥无效 — 请在设置中检查您的密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Feature requires EMRALD Pro. Upgrade at effortmastery.com/pro
ast.target: 此功能需要EMRALD Pro。请在effortmastery.com/pro升级。

ast.name: label
ast.source: When do you do your best, most focused work?
ast.target: 你何时能完成最好、最专注的工作？

ast.name: label
ast.source: Do you prefer intense bursts or steady work?
ast.target: 你更喜欢高强度冲刺还是稳定工作？

ast.name: label
ast.source: In general, how well do you sleep?
ast.target: 总体而言，你的睡眠质量如何？

ast.name: label
ast.target: 我有条理且能坚持到底

ast.name: label
ast.target: 新的挑战让我充满活力

ast.name: label
ast.source: I can do routine work for long stretches
ast.target: 我能长时间从事常规工作

ast.name: label
ast.source: How often do you delay starting tasks?
ast.target: 你多久会拖延开始任务？

ast.name: label
ast.source: When you procrastinate, it's usually because...
ast.target: 当你拖延时，通常是因为...

ast.name: label
ast.source: Which type of work energizes you most?
ast.target: 哪种类型的工作最能让你充满活力？

ast.name: label
ast.source: Which type of work drains you most?
ast.target: 哪种类型的工作最让你消耗？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How much control over your daily choices?
ast.target: 你对日常选择有多少控制权？

ast.name: label
ast.source: I often set goals but later pursue different ones
ast.target: 我经常设定目标，但后来又追求不同的目标

ast.name: label
ast.source: I maintain effort on long projects even when progress is slow
ast.target: 即使进展缓慢，我也能在长期项目上保持努力

ast.name: label
ast.source: I tend to act on impulse

ast.name: label
ast.source: I prefer clear plans over flexible situations
ast.target: 我更喜欢清晰的计划而非灵活的情况

ast.name: label
ast.source: I find it easy to delegate work
ast.target: 我发现委派工作很容易

ast.name: label
ast.source: I prioritize logical consistency over impact on people
ast.target: 我优先考虑逻辑一致性而非对人的影响

ast.name: label
ast.source: I'm driven by a desire for...

ast.name: label
ast.source: When overwhelmed, my first response is to...
ast.target: 当不堪重负时，我的第一反应是...

ast.name: label
ast.source: I need regular variety to stay engaged
ast.target: 我需要定期的变化来保持投入

ast.name: label
ast.source: I find supporting others' projects fulfilling
ast.target: 我发现支持他人的项目很有成就感

ast.name: label
ast.target: 你对不熟悉的挑战有多自信？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How connected to people who depend on your work?
ast.target: 你与依赖你工作的人有多紧密的联系？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How would you rate your physical fitness?
ast.target: 你如何评价自己的身体健康状况？

ast.name: label
ast.source: Longest project you've sustained consistent effort on?
ast.target: 你持续付出一致努力的最长项目是多久？

ast.name: label
ast.source: Hours of focused work before quality drops?
ast.target: 在质量下降前，你能专注工作多少小时？

ast.name: label
ast.target: 经过90分钟高强度工作后，需要多长时间恢复？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How many life areas do you actively manage?
ast.target: 你积极管理多少个生活领域？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How often do you feel like you're juggling too much?
ast.target: 你多久会感觉自己同时处理太多事情？

ast.name: label
ast.target: 4个不同任务还是1个深度任务？

ast.name: label
ast.source: How important is it that work feels meaningful?
ast.target: 工作感觉有意义有多重要？

ast.name: label
ast.source: Activities that put you in deep focus most easily
ast.target: 最能让你进入深度专注的活动

ast.name: label
ast.source: Task type you most consistently avoid
ast.target: 你最常回避的任务类型

ast.name: label
ast.source: On a free day, what do you do first?
ast.target: 在自由的一天，你首先做什么？

ast.name: label
ast.target: 当前最大的生产力挫折

ast.name: message
ast.source: You're in a good place. Your effort patterns look healthy and sustainable. Keep doing what you're doing.
ast.target: 你目前状态良好。你的努力模式看起来健康且可持续。继续保持。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Some signals suggest you might be pushing a bit hard. Nothing urgent — just keep an eye on your recharge.
ast.target: 一些信号表明你可能有点用力过猛。没什么紧急的——只需留意一下你的恢复情况。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Multiple indicators suggest you're running hot. Consider lighter sessions, more breaks, or activities that recharge you.
ast.target: 多项指标表明你正处于高负荷状态。考虑安排更轻松的活动、更多休息，或做一些能让你恢复精力的事情。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Your patterns strongly suggest burnout risk. Please prioritize rest and recharge. This isn't a failure — it's your body asking for what it needs.
ast.target: 你的模式强烈暗示存在倦怠风险。请优先考虑休息和恢复。这不是失败——这是你的身体在表达它的需求。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 离线 — 显示缓存数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD now has the fullest picture of how you work. Your effort predictions, burnout detection, and insights will be at their most accurate.
ast.target: EMRALD 现在对你如何工作有了最全面的了解。你的努力预测、倦怠检测和洞察将是最准确的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can revisit and update your answers anytime in the Effort Profile workspace view. EMRALD will also prompt you to re-calibrate when it detects your patterns have shifted.
ast.target: 你可以随时在努力档案工作区视图中重新查看和更新你的答案。当 EMRALD 检测到你的模式发生变化时，也会提示你重新校准。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Questions below are for future integrations, answers optional.
ast.target: 以下问题用于未来集成，答案可选。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You've completed your basic Effort Profile — EMRALD is already working for you.
ast.target: 你已完成基础努力档案——EMRALD 已经开始为你工作了。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Advanced mode unlocks 30 additional calibration questions that help EMRALD understand your work style at a deeper level. They're presented gradually — just 3-4 questions before each session, over about 8 sessions.
ast.target: 高级模式解锁了 30 个额外的校准问题，帮助 EMRALD 更深入地理解你的工作风格。这些问题会逐步呈现——大约 8 次会话，每次会话前只需回答 3-4 个问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can always switch back to Simple mode in settings.
ast.target: 你随时可以在设置中切换回简单模式。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 也许以后再说——保持简单模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Track your work sessions, measure effort in real time, and let EMRALD surface patterns you might otherwise miss.
ast.target: 追踪你的工作会话，实时衡量努力程度，让 EMRALD 发现你可能忽略的模式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Track work sessions with effort-aware timing
ast.target: 通过努力感知计时追踪工作会话

ast.name: text
ast.source: See 20 metrics about how you work
ast.target: 查看 20 项关于你工作方式的指标

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get burnout warnings before you feel it
ast.target: 在你感觉到之前获得倦怠预警

ast.name: text
ast.target: 接收 AI 驱动的努力洞察

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your API key to connect. You can get one from your EMRALD dashboard.
ast.target: 输入你的 API 密钥进行连接。你可以从 EMRALD 仪表板获取一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Don't have an API key? Get one at app.effortmastery.com →
ast.target: 没有 API 密钥？在 app.effortmastery.com 获取 →

ast.name: text
ast.target: 跳过 — 我稍后再配置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tell EMRALD a bit about your work capacity. This helps calibrate effort levels. You can always update these later.
ast.target: 告诉 EMRALD 一些关于你工作能力的信息。这有助于校准努力水平。你随时可以稍后更新这些信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How many hours per day do you work on projects?
ast.target: 你每天在项目上工作多少小时？

ast.name: text
ast.source: This sets your daily time budget. You can override it any day.
ast.target: 这将设定你的每日时间预算。你可以在任何一天覆盖它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These questions help EMRALD calibrate effort levels to your personal style. Be honest — there are no wrong answers.
ast.target: 这些问题帮助 EMRALD 根据你的个人风格校准努力水平。请诚实回答——没有错误答案。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Recharge activities are things that restore your energy — like walking, piano, or reading. When EMRALD detects burnout risk, it will suggest these as a gentle nudge, not a prescription.
ast.target: 恢复活动是那些能让你恢复精力的事情——比如散步、弹钢琴或阅读。当 EMRALD 检测到倦怠风险时，会建议这些活动作为一种温和的提醒，而不是强制要求。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 最多添加 3 项恢复活动

ast.name: text
ast.source: Press Enter to add another. These help EMRALD suggest recovery when it matters.
ast.target: 按 Enter 添加另一项。这些活动帮助 EMRALD 在需要时建议恢复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How many hours per day do you typically devote to tracked projects?
ast.target: 你通常每天花多少小时在已追踪的项目上？

ast.name: text
ast.source: A tracked project is something you're actively working on: a creative pursuit, a work initiative, a learning goal, a side project. It's bigger than a single task or errand.
ast.target: 已追踪的项目是你正在积极进行的事情：一个创意追求、一个工作计划、一个学习目标、一个副业项目。它比单一任务或琐事更大。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Think of it as anything worth dedicating focused time to. Your novel, your certification prep, a weekly meal-planning routine, learning a new song on piano — not your grocery list.
ast.target: 把它想象成任何值得投入专注时间的事情。你的小说、你的认证备考、每周的餐食计划、学习一首新的钢琴曲——而不是你的购物清单。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What are you working on? Give each project an effort level — EMRALD uses this to measure what your day actually costs you.
ast.target: 你在做什么？为每个项目设定一个努力级别——EMRALD 用它来衡量你的一天实际付出了多少。

ast.name: text
ast.source: We recommend keeping 5 or fewer active projects. Focus is a feature, not a limitation.
ast.target: 我们建议保持 5 个或更少的活跃项目。专注是一种特性，而不是限制。

ast.name: text
ast.source: E1 = Light (25% of your daily work time)
ast.target: E1 = 轻松（占你每日工作时间的 25%）

ast.name: text
ast.source: E2 = Moderate (50% of your daily work time)
ast.target: E2 = 中等（占你每日工作时间的 50%）

ast.name: text
ast.source: E4 = Maximum (100% of your daily work time)
ast.target: E4 = 最大（占你每日工作时间的 100%）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: click the link icon to connect a project to an existing note — EMRALD will sync session data directly to that note. Without a link, the project lives only in your project list.
ast.target: 提示：点击链接图标可将项目关联到现有笔记——EMRALD会将会话数据直接同步到该笔记。若不关联，项目仅存在于您的项目列表中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add at least 1 to get started. You can always add more later.
ast.target: 至少添加1项以开始。您随时可以稍后添加更多。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD has enough data to start working for you. Track your sessions, check your metrics, and if you're a PRO user, get insights right away.
ast.target: EMRALD已拥有足够数据，可以开始为您工作。跟踪您的会话，查看您的指标，如果您是PRO用户，还能立即获得洞察。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Want even smarter insights? Complete your Effort Profile — it helps EMRALD understand your work style, calibrate effort levels, and catch burnout patterns earlier.
ast.target: 想要更智能的洞察？完成您的努力画像——它能帮助EMRALD理解您的工作风格，校准努力程度，并更早发现倦怠模式。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 可随时在“设置 → 隐私”中更改。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在加载您当前的画像...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Questions below are optional — for future integrations.
ast.target: 以下问题为可选——用于未来的集成。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在保存您更新的画像...

ast.name: text
ast.source: You've already submitted your energy check-in today. Come back tomorrow!
ast.target: 您今天已经提交过能量签到了。明天再来吧！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rest, hobbies, exercise, anything that recharged your batteries.
ast.target: 休息、爱好、运动，任何能为您充电的活动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Every session — even a short one — gives EMRALD better data to work with. Start small if you need to.
ast.target: 每次会话——即使很短——都能为EMRALD提供更好的数据。如果需要，可以从少量开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Every receipt you submit makes EMRALD smarter about your effort patterns. Keep going — your data tells a story no task list ever could.
ast.target: 您提交的每张收据都让EMRALD更了解您的努力模式。继续加油——您的数据讲述着任务清单永远无法呈现的故事。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This can't be undone for today.

ast.name: text
ast.target: ⚡ 待同步 — 本地跟踪中

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active projects. Add one to get started.
ast.target: 没有活动项目。添加一个以开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add your first project from the sidebar to see your effort allocation here.
ast.target: 从侧边栏添加您的第一个项目，即可在此查看您的努力分配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consider reducing effort levels or deactivating a project.
ast.target: 考虑降低努力等级或停用一个项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD generates insights as it learns your work patterns. The more sessions you complete and receipts you fill out, the smarter it gets.
ast.target: EMRALD在学习您的工作模式时会生成洞察。您完成的会话和填写的收据越多，它就越智能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Complete work sessions with effort receipts
ast.target: • 完成工作会话并填写努力收据

ast.name: text
ast.source: recovery effectiveness, effort volatility, calibration drift, project momentum, and more.
ast.target: 恢复效果、努力波动性、校准漂移、项目势头等。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only 1 data point — need at least 2 for a chart.
ast.target: 仅有1个数据点——图表至少需要2个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Complete the calibration questions during onboarding or at the start of your next session. Your effort profile helps EMRALD calibrate everything to you.
ast.target: 在引导过程中或下次会话开始时完成校准问题。您的努力画像帮助EMRALD为您校准一切。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 校准漂移 (D19) — 数据收集中

ast.name: text
ast.source: View raw d19 data in data center →
ast.target: 在数据中心查看原始 d19 数据 →

ast.name: text
ast.source: Builds after ~1 week of sessions and check-ins
ast.target: 在约1周的会话和签到后建立

ast.name: text
ast.source: These activities will be suggested when your effort patterns show signs of strain.
ast.target: 当您的努力模式显示出压力迹象时，将建议这些活动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How your calibration scores have evolved over time.
ast.target: 您的校准分数随时间的变化情况。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See your calibration data (d19) in data center →
ast.target: 在数据中心查看您的校准数据 (d19) →

ast.name: text
ast.source: The burnout monitor needs session data and effort receipts to understand your patterns. Complete a few work sessions and this dashboard will come alive.
ast.target: 倦怠监测器需要会话数据和努力收据来了解您的模式。完成几个工作会话后，此仪表板将开始运作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No action needed right now. These suggestions will become more specific as EMRALD learns your patterns.
ast.target: 目前无需采取行动。随着 EMRALD 学习您的模式，这些建议将变得更加具体。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your recharge activities are being tracked — EMRALD is learning what recharges you.
ast.target: 您的充电活动正在被追踪 — EMRALD 正在学习什么能让您恢复精力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consider logging recharge activities so EMRALD can learn what recharges you.
ast.target: 考虑记录充电活动，以便 EMRALD 能学习什么能让您恢复精力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Keep your current rhythm — it's working.
ast.target: 保持您当前的节奏 — 它很有效。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在会话之间安排有意识的休息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Prioritize sleep — it's your fastest recovery lever.
ast.target: 优先保证睡眠 — 这是您最快的恢复杠杆。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consider dropping one E-level on your heaviest project.
ast.target: 考虑在您最繁重的项目上降低一个 E 级别。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do something that recharges you today — not productive, just enjoyable.
ast.target: 今天做点能恢复您精力的事 — 不必有成效，只需享受。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you can cancel or reschedule non-essential commitments, do it.
ast.target: 如果可以取消或重新安排非必要的承诺，就去做吧。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Take a full rest day. Not a light day — a real rest day.
ast.target: 休息一整天。不是轻松的一天 — 而是真正的休息日。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reach out to someone you trust. Burnout is easier with support.
ast.target: 联系您信任的人。有支持，倦怠更容易应对。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pause non-essential projects. They'll be there when you're ready.
ast.target: 暂停非必要的项目。当您准备好时，它们还在那里。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This tracks your D8 Burnout Risk Score over time. Each point is the daily score (0–100). A flat line near 0 means no risk signals. Rising trends mean burnout indicators are accumulating.
ast.target: 此图表追踪您的 D8 倦怠风险分数随时间的变化。每个点代表每日分数（0-100）。接近 0 的平坦线表示没有风险信号。上升趋势意味着倦怠指标正在累积。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD generates weekly and monthly summaries automatically as you work. Complete a few sessions and your first digest will appear here.
ast.target: EMRALD 会在您工作时自动生成每周和每月摘要。完成几个会话后，您的第一份摘要将出现在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.target: • 完成至少 3 个工作会话

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Fill out effort receipts after each session
ast.target: • 每个会话后填写努力收据

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Wait for the weekly summary cycle

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD helps you manage the effort of your life, not just your tasks.
ast.target: EMRALD 帮助您管理生活中的努力，而不仅仅是任务。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It learns from your sessions, your energy, and your honest feedback to show you what your projects are really costing you.
ast.target: 它从您的会话、您的精力和您的诚实反馈中学习，向您展示您的项目真正花费了您什么。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD exists to make the invisible cost of your work visible, enabling you to protect your energy, spot burnout before it hits, and make honest decisions about where your effort goes.
ast.target: EMRALD 的存在是为了让您的工作成本变得可见，使您能够保护精力，在倦怠来袭前发现它，并就努力去向做出诚实的决定。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Effort isn’t energy — it’s what you spend your energy on.
ast.target: 努力不是精力 — 它是您花费精力的地方。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You don't burn out from too many tasks. You burn out from too much effort in the wrong places.
ast.target: 您不会因为任务太多而倦怠。您会因为在错误的地方投入了太多努力而倦怠。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Honest data in, honest insights out.
ast.target: 输入诚实的数据，输出诚实的见解。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The promise of EMRALD is not instant insight. It's real insight, earned through consistent, honest use over time.
ast.target: EMRALD 的承诺不是即时的见解。而是真实的见解，通过持续、诚实的使用随时间积累而来。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD works across your whole life
ast.target: EMRALD 贯穿您的整个生活

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your novel. Learning piano. A home renovation. Family commitments. Side projects. EMRALD doesn’t care if it’s a work task or a personal one — if it takes focused time and costs you something, it belongs here.
ast.target: 您的小说。学习钢琴。家庭装修。家庭承诺。副业项目。EMRALD 不在乎它是工作任务还是个人任务 — 如果它需要专注的时间并让您付出代价，它就属于这里。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD PRO unlocks the full intelligence layer — 11 additional metrics, all 5 insight categories, weekly and monthly digests, AI suggestions, and more.
ast.target: EMRALD PRO 解锁完整的智能层 — 11 项额外指标、全部 5 个见解类别、每周和每月摘要、AI 建议等等。

ast.name: text
ast.source: AI-powered insight logs across 5 distinct categories
ast.target: 跨 5 个不同类别的 AI 驱动见解日志

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supercharged data center with 11 additional metrics (D9–D20)
ast.target: 增强的数据中心，包含 11 项额外指标 (D9–D20)

ast.name: text
ast.target: 1 分钟同步时间（基础版为 5 分钟）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pinned metrics, AI insights, daily digests, and advanced analytics — all with PRO.
ast.target: 固定指标、AI 见解、每日摘要和高级分析 — 全部包含在 PRO 中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: EMRALD is not configured. Please add your API key in settings.
ast.target: EMRALD 未配置。请在设置中添加您的 API 密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What would you like to do?

ast.name: text
ast.target: 保留 — 无论如何记录它
